style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an overhead shot of two masculine hands, one gloved in black, one bare, tearing an ancient parchment in half that shows the word PAX in gold calligraphy
subject.focal_point: the tearing split releasing orange embers from the fiber
subject.secondary: The parchment fibers are visible mid-tear; no faces shown, only gloved and bare forearms
props: parchment with word PAX in gold

composition.foreground: hands, parchment and PAX word in vivid gold-crimson
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white empty council chairs around edges

mood.emotion: the active verb of taking peace away

symbolism.primary: pax being literally torn by powers

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

in_scene_text.font_style: ornate Roman calligraphy in molten gold leaf

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
